title: Axon Achieves Great Place to Work Certification Second Year in a Row
text: Great Place To Work is the global authority on workplace culture, employee experience and the leadership behaviors proven to deliver market-leading revenue, employee retention and increased innovation SCOTTSDALE, Ariz. , Sept. 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Axon Enterprise Inc. , (NASDAQ: AXON), the global public safety technology leader, proudly announced today that it has been Certified™ by Great Place To Work® for the second year in a row.
